data.name: 職場女友帶回家
data.detailed_description:
Yokoshima is an unsuccessful magazine editor who is in love with the raven-haired beauty of the same company, Hazuki Ichinose.

He's been trying to work up the courage to ask her on a date, but hasn’t been able to go through with it.

However, it turns out that Hazuki is going to transfer overseas!

If he's ever going to have a chance, he needs to follow through before that happens!

Features:

  • A Romance RPG

  • Visual Novel Elements

  • Modern Setting

  • Gather Information on Hazuki's Likes and Dislikes
data.about_the_game:
Yokoshima is an unsuccessful magazine editor who is in love with the raven-haired beauty of the same company, Hazuki Ichinose.

He's been trying to work up the courage to ask her on a date, but hasn’t been able to go through with it.

However, it turns out that Hazuki is going to transfer overseas!

If he's ever going to have a chance, he needs to follow through before that happens!

Features:

  • A Romance RPG

  • Visual Novel Elements

  • Modern Setting

  • Gather Information on Hazuki's Likes and Dislikes
data.short_description: When Yokoshima finds out his office crush, Hazuki Ichinose, is transferring overseas, he realizes that he needs to act and finally ask her out.
data.supported_languages:
英文, 日文*, 簡體中文
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

data.legal_notice: © Kagura Games and RetroLab, All Rights Reserved.

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • OS *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • Processor: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 300 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.

  • Processor: 2+ GHz Processor
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
